feature.description: Explore what you can build with Bro World.

steps.step1: 1. Verify the project is provisioning-ready and has GitHub repositories.
steps.step2: 2. Open the Repositories page and validate linked repositories.
steps.step3: 3. From GitHub Sync, load repositories and select the target branch.
steps.step4: 4. Create or link branches from Task Requests to connect product execution and code.
steps.step5: 5. Track sync jobs and confirm PR/commit traceability in CRM.
